notes: Join OCR lines into paragraphs with space separator and resolve end-of-line hyphenation. CER improved from 0.1107 to 0.0952.
VNDetectDocumentSegmentationRequest + crop to detected region. Score regressed massively - document segmentation crops incorrectly on book pages.
Add page number extraction from top/bottom 15% margin observations. Page number accuracy: 0.0 -> 0.382.
Filter facing-page text by keeping only the dominant text column (left/right side). CER improved from 0.0952 to 0.0846.
Improved facing-page filter using body column overlap detection instead of simple left/right split. CER improved from 0.0846 to 0.0239.
Improved page number extraction to parse numbers from running headers/footers (not just standalone). Page accuracy: 0.382 -> 0.559.
Filter running headers/footers from body text. Remove short lines in top/bottom 10% margin that are narrower than 70% of median line width. CER improved from 0.0239 to 0.0200.
Sort observations by descending Y for top-to-bottom reading order. Score regressed from 0.0285 to 0.0313 - naive Y-sorting breaks reading order for some pages.
Improved page number extraction: parse numbers with attached punctuation (e.g. 86•), prefer header-embedded numbers over small standalone numbers (footnote markers). Page accuracy: 0.559 -> 0.588.
